'''gachudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocioception|nocioception]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocioception|nocioception]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gachudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæchidith|gæchidith]] || [[word:gæchidij|gæchidij]] || [[word:gæchidish|gæchidish]] || [[word:gæchidi|gæchidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gachuchuduth|gachuchuduth]] || [[word:gachuchuduj|gachuchuduj]] || [[word:gachuchudush|gachuchudush]] || [[word:gachuchudu|gachuchudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gachuduth|gachuduth]] || [[word:gachuduj|gachuduj]] || [[word:gachudush|gachudush]] || [[word:gachudu|gachudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gachufduth|gachufduth]] || [[word:gachufduj|gachufduj]] || [[word:gachufdush|gachufdush]] || [[word:gachufduf|gachufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gachuduthu|gachuduthu]] || [[word:gachuduju|gachuduju]] || [[word:gachudushu|gachudushu]] || [[word:gachuduku|gachuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gachuduth|gachuduth]] || [[word:gachuduj|gachuduj]] || [[word:gachudush|gachudush]] || [[word:gachudu|gachudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gachuduthul|gachuduthul]] || [[word:gachudujul|gachudujul]] || [[word:gachudushul|gachudushul]] || [[word:gachudukul|gachudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gachuduthuthu|gachuduthuthu]] || [[word:gachudujuju|gachudujuju]] || [[word:gachudushushu|gachudushushu]] || [[word:gachuduku|gachuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gachuduthun|gachuduthun]] || [[word:gachudujun|gachudujun]] || [[word:gachudushun|gachudushun]] || [[word:gachudukun|gachudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gachuduthuoro|gachuduthuoro]] || [[word:gachudujuoro|gachudujuoro]] || [[word:gachudushuoro|gachudushuoro]] || [[word:gachudukuoro|gachudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
